extensions.name: Particles Tools
extensions.description: AI MCP tools for Godot GpuParticles (2D & 3D): create, configure, start/stop, and inspect emitters.

tools.name: particles-defaults
tools.description: Return the recommended starter config for a 2D/3D emitter.

tools.name: particles-create
tools.description: Create a GpuParticles2D/GpuParticles3D node in the edited scene.

tools.name: particles-configure
tools.description: Update an emitter's scalar properties (clamped to valid ranges).

tools.name: particles-set-emitting
tools.description: Start or stop emission, optionally restarting first.
